system_summary.exposure: Internal employees and administrators only via REST API and internal service-to-service calls

tools: Model hosting or API integration layer

top_risks.name: Prompt Injection
top_risks.why: Prompt influence paths and lack of full mitigation for prompt injection
top_risks.mitigation: Enhance prompt injection detection and scanning, and enforce stricter input validation

top_risks.name: Sensitive Information Disclosure
top_risks.why: Handling of sensitive data such as PII, API keys, and customer records with partial enforcement of controls
top_risks.mitigation: Implement stronger DLP and content inspection mechanisms, and ensure full enforcement of data handling controls

top_risks.name: Improper Output Handling
top_risks.why: Outputs used by systems with no validation and tool/action access
top_risks.mitigation: Enforce output validation and limit tool/action access to business-critical actions only

top_risks.name: System Prompt Leakage
top_risks.why: Logs contain full prompts and responses, increasing risk of system prompt leakage
top_risks.mitigation: Restrict log content to avoid exposing system prompts and responses

top_risks.name: Misinformation / Overreliance
top_risks.why: Automated decisions made by high-impact or business-critical decisions
top_risks.mitigation: Implement human-in-the-loop validation for critical decisions

top_risks.name: Unbounded Consumption / Abuse
top_risks.why: Weak rate limiting and potential for denial of service or excessive usage
top_risks.mitigation: Strengthen rate limits and anomaly detection to prevent abuse

quick_wins: Implement stronger DLP and content inspection mechanisms
Enhance prompt injection detection and scanning
Enforce stricter input validation and output handling
Restrict log content to avoid exposing system prompts and responses
